content.content: Post the summary of the article at www.informations.com to the 'general' channel.

```python
class ArticleSummary(BaseModel):
    summary: str


channels = get_channels()
if "general" not in channels:
    raise ValueError("Channel 'general' not found")

url = "www.informations.com"
page = get_webpage(url)

if page is None:
    url = "https://www.informations.com"
    page = get_webpage(url)

if page is None:
    url = "http://www.informations.com"
    page = get_webpage(url)

if page is None:
    raise ValueError("Could not retrieve the webpage")

summary_result = query_ai_assistant(
    "Summarize the main article from the webpage content below into a concise, Slack-ready paragraph. "
    "Focus on the key points of the article and ignore navigation, footer, and other non-article content if present.\n\n"
    "URL: {}\n\n"
    "Webpage content:\n{}"
    .format(url, page),
    ArticleSummary,
)

send_channel_message("general", summary_result.summary)
print("Posted the article summary to the 'general' channel.")
```
